text: In this code, “Department of Public Safety” means the Department of Public Safety of the State of Texas.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 1
### Chapter 1. Gen. Provisions
##### § 1.004 — Definition

In this code, “Department of Public Safety” means the Department of Public Safety of the State of Texas.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this code, “Department of Public Safety” means the Department of Public Safety of the State of Texas.
